61.reason: [This line incorrectly maps ">=" to "==". It should be singles.put(">=", new Single(">=", "GEQ")); and singles.put("==", new Single("==", "EQL")); is missing]

565.reason: [This condition assumes there are at least i+2 tokens ahead, which may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when input is short or malformed. Also, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef based on lookahead is flawed—it doesn't correctly follow the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef and may skip or misclassify components.]

Also, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef based on lookahead is flawed—it doesn't correctly follow the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef and may skip or misclassify components.]

568.reason: [Similarly, this lookahead assumes existence of i+1 token and incorrectly uses "main" as a marker for FuncDef termination, but FuncDef starts with FuncType (void/int/char), not necessarily followed immediately by non-main identifiers. This can lead to infinite loops or missed declarations.]
